subject: Vespera Tertius Nocturnis Bastion
fact: CHAR_alaric_morn shouted to the area; an uncanny, relay-like repetition of his voice returned with tar-and-incense odor and a cold draft in Vespera Tertius Nocturnis Bastion, witnessed by CHAR_a_fatigued_deckhand_messenger, CHAR_danel_vossik, CHAR_iscar_venn, and CHAR_kaelen_vos.
